channel.title: Interview on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Interview on Arrans github.io

item.title: donnemartin/system-design-primer
item.description: Learn how to design large-scale systems. Prep for the system design interview. Includes Anki flashcards.

item.title: binhnguyennus/awesome-scalability
item.description: The Patterns of Scalable, Reliable, and Performant Large-Scale Systems

item.title: Tikam02/DevOps-Guide
item.description: DevOps Guide - Development to Production all configurations with basic notes to debug efficiently.

item.title: poteto/hiring-without-whiteboards
item.description: ⭐️ Companies that don’t have a broken hiring process

item.title: trimstray/test-your-sysadmin-skills
item.description: A collection of Linux Sysadmin Test Questions and Answers. Test your knowledge and skills in different fields with these Q/A.
